column1: # Polymarket Vortex Pulse V5 Ś Session Log
# Snapshot rows logged every ~15s. TRADE_EVENT rows on buy/sell/settle.
# SNAPSHOT FIELDS:
#   Timestamp      Ś Wall-clock time of snapshot
#   SimBal         Ś Simulated wallet balance (USD)
#   LiveBal        Ś Live Polymarket wallet balance (USD)
#   RiskBankroll   Ś Current risk-adjusted bankroll available for bets (USD)
#   TimeRem        Ś Time remaining in current 5-min window (MM:SS)
#   BTC_Price      Ś Live BTC/USD price from Kraken WS / Binance fallback
#   BTC_Open       Ś BTC price at window open (Kraken REST)
#   BTC_Diff       Ś BTC_Price minus BTC_Open (USD)
#   BTC_Range      Ś Intra-window high-low price range (USD)
#   Odds_Score     Ś Polymarket UP-DN bid skew in cents (+ve = UP favoured)
#   Trend_4H       Ś 4-hour macro trend direction (S-UP/M-UP/W-UP/NEUTRAL/W-DOWN/M-DOWN/S-DOWN)
#   Trend_1H       Ś 1-hour trend direction (same scale)
#   RSI_1m         Ś 14-period RSI on 1-minute Binance candles
#   ATR_5m         Ś 5-period Average True Range on 1-minute candles (USD)
#   Sig_Slingshot  Ś Slingshot scanner signal this tick (WAIT/OFF/BET_UP/BET_DOWN)
#   Sig_Cobra      Ś Cobra scanner signal this tick
#   Sig_CoiledCobraŚ Coiled Cobra (CCO) scanner signal this tick
#   Sig_Flag       Ś BullFlag scanner signal this tick
#   Master_Score   Ś Net scanner consensus: (# UP signals) minus (# DOWN signals)
#   Master_Status  Ś Aggregate direction: BUY_UP / BUY_DN / NEUTRAL
#   Active_ScannersŚ Count of scanners firing a BET signal this tick
#   UP_Price       Ś Polymarket UP option midpoint price
#   DN_Price       Ś Polymarket DOWN option midpoint price
#   UP_Bid         Ś Polymarket UP option best bid
#   DN_Bid         Ś Polymarket DOWN option best bid
#   Shares_UP      Ś Current UP shares held
#   Shares_DN      Ś Current DOWN shares held
# TRADE_EVENT FIELDS (interleaved rows):
#   TRADE_EVENT
Timestamp
TRADE_EVENT
TRADE_EVENT
TRADE_EVENT
TRADE_EVENT
